name: Deathmon

signature_move.name: Death Arrow
signature_move.description: Fires energy arrows from the eyes on its hands.

description: Like Demon , it was originally a high-ranking Angel Digimon, but it fell to the Dark Area and is now one of the Demon Lord Digimon. Despite being a Demon Lord Digimon, it differs from other Fallen Angel and Devil Digimon in that it does not dedicate itself to performing evil deeds, but instead it simply maintains a neutral position as a silent observer. However, it is a terrifying Digimon, and it is told that when the impending final battle arrives, its whitened appearance will change to jet-black darkness, and it will transform into a god of destruction. Its Special Moves are an arrow of death fired from the evil eye s on its hands ( Death Arrow ), and a destructive beam fired when the eye in its head shines deep crimson ( Explosion Eye ). Deathmon was adopted from a winning Digimon entry in the " Digimon Web Dot-art Contest " which belonged to Mr. Ino Takahiro from Yamagata prefecture .
